summary: Successfully tested all required features - Mobile hamburger menu, Buildings toggle, Admin maintenance controls, and backend APIs all working correctly

resolved_issues.description: Previous iteration had critical routing failures with public URLs returning 404

passed_tests: ✅ Mobile hamburger menu opens for authenticated users ([data-testid='mobile-menu-toggle'])
✅ Mobile menu overlay shows 11 menu items including admin item
✅ Buildings toggle button shows red (off) state initially ([data-testid='buildings-toggle'])
✅ Buildings toggle displays 'В процессе разработки' message when clicked
✅ Admin page accessible at /admin with proper authentication
✅ Maintenance toggle button found with dropdown menu ([data-testid='maintenance-toggle-btn'])
✅ Maintenance dropdown shows 'Начать прямо сейчас' and 'Установить время начала' options
✅ Backend maintenance status API returns {enabled: false}
✅ Backend admin authentication working (admin@toncity.com login successful)
✅ Backend admin maintenance control endpoints functional
✅ All core APIs working (config: 21 business types, island: 528 cells)
✅ Admin user correctly identified with is_admin: true
